headline: Kirkwood Pulse • April 26, 2026
overview: The Cardinals lost 11-9 to the Mariners at Busch Stadium despite Nathan Church's two homers and a five-homer team effort, marking only the second time in 86 years they hit five home runs at home and still lost. The bullpen's late collapse allowed the Mariners to rally, highlighting ongoing pitching concerns for the local team. The Cardinals lost their recent game despite strong performances from Nathan Church, Oli Marmol, and Matthew Liberatore, highlighting individual efforts that fell short of securing a win for the local team.

items.title: Saturday’s Game Report: Mariners 11, Cardinals 9
items.excerpt: Nathan Church hit two of the Cardinals five home runs and robbed a would-be homer on defense but a late bullpen collapse gave the Mariners the win over the Cardinals on Saturday at Busch Stadium. [...]The post Saturday’s Game Report:…
